name: mcp-neo4j-typescript
description: TypeScript implementation of Neo4j MCP server for schema introspection and Cypher query execution.
long_description: A TypeScript Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that provides tools for interacting with Neo4j graph databases. Features schema introspection using APOC procedures and Cypher query execution with parameter support, type safety, and comprehensive error handling.

tools.name: get_neo4j_schema
tools.description: List all nodes, their attributes and their relationships to other nodes in the neo4j database. This requires that the APOC plugin is installed and enabled.

tools.name: run_cypher_query
tools.description: Execute a Cypher query on the Neo4j database. Supports both read and write operations with parameter binding.

neo4j_username.title: Neo4j Username
neo4j_username.description: The username for logging into Neo4j

neo4j_password.title: Neo4j Password
neo4j_password.description: The password for logging into Neo4j

neo4j_database.title: Neo4j Database
neo4j_database.description: The database to use in Neo4j, defaults to neo4j

neo4j_uri.title: Neo4j URI
neo4j_uri.description: The URI for connecting to Neo4j

read_only.title: Read Only Mode
read_only.description: Allow only read-only queries, no write operations permitted.
